events.label: assistant
events.text: Findings written to `/app/answer.json`: this is a critical stop-work condition — venting trapped pressure directly at face level is an imminent injury hazard and indicates the depressurization step was done out of safe sequence (no verified safe vent path before opening the manifold). Decision is `fail` with `critical` risk; work cannot continue until the vent is redirected away from personnel, LOTO/zero-energy is confirmed, PPE is verified, and depressurization is redone per the manufacturer's procedure.
